nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: Grey butcherbird
nodes.summary: Grey butcherbird（Grey butcherbird，学名 Cracticus torquatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The nest is lined with grasses and other soft fibres. Nests are normally located within off the ground. The grey butcherbird is found in a range of habitats, from eucalypt forests and woodlands, mallee and acacia shrublands, rainforests and riparian vegetation to urban areas and residential townships. The denser forests tend to be the favour for inland areas
